checks.note: Identity registry bound the operator settlement key to the Chio Ed25519 key hash.
Operator registered the beneficiary entity binding for settlement parity checks.
Root registry accepted a bounded delegate publisher for the operator.
Authorized delegate published a root against the operator namespace with canonical publisher traceability.
Revoked delegates can no longer publish roots.
Price resolver returned the configured feed value under healthy sequencer conditions.
Price resolver rejects stale feeds and sequencer-down conditions.
Escrow accepts the detailed RFC6962 proof path and supports partial settlement.
Escrow accepts the operator-bound dual-signature release path and rejects mismatched signers.
Escrow refunds only after expiry and not before.
Escrow identity remains deterministic under interleaving submissions and duplicate replays fail closed.
Bond vault locks collateral on-chain while preserving reserve requirement metadata from the signed Chio bond terms for parity and review.
Bond vault releases collateral only on the detailed proof path and rejects the under-specified interface.
Bond identity remains deterministic under interleaving submissions and duplicate replays fail closed.
